utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Step 1: Count the number of items in the required format. The format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget.
Step 2: Check the final coverage plan for each item.
- health_coverage: Present. Includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs. Physical health coverage (€100/month), preventive care (€150/month), and mental health coverage (€65/month) are specified. This satisfies 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'.
- property_coverage: Present. Includes home/contents insurance with costs: home_contents (€95/month) and electronics (€40/month). Meets requirement.
- travel_coverage: Present. Includes travel insurance with costs: premium_travel (€115/month) and business_support (€10/month). Meets requirement.
- additional_services: Present. Contains enhancement service (Family Insurance Concierge) with cost (€50/month). Meets requirement.
- total_budget: Present. Complete monthly (€625) and annual (€7,500) cost breakdown provided.
Step 3: All 5 items are present and fully specified with the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:
Step 1: Identify all the items in the final coverage plan.
Health coverage: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan (€100/month)' for physical, 'Preventive Care Package (€150/month)' for preventive care, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan (€65/month)' for mental.
Property coverage: 'EliteHome Premium Coverage (€95/month)' for home_contents, 'Technology Protection (€40/month)' for electronics.
Travel coverage: 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan (€115/month)' for premium_travel, 'Business Travel Support (€10/month equivalent annualized from €120/year)' for business_support.
Additional services: 'Family Insurance Concierge (€50/month)'.

Step 2: Match each to ground-truth ratings.
- LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) maps to primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan → rating 8.
- Preventive Care Package maps to health_enhancement_services.Preventive Care Package → rating 8.
- LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) maps to primary_health_coverage.mental_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan → rating 8.
- EliteHome Premium Coverage maps to property_protection.home_content.EliteHome Premium Coverage → rating 10.
- Technology Protection maps to property_enhancement_services.Technology Protection → rating 10.
- PrimeTravel Premium Plan maps to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.PrimeTravel Premium Plan → rating 10.
- Business Travel Support maps to travel_enhancement_services.Business Travel Support → rating 10.
- Family Insurance Concierge is not directly listed in ground-truth ratings. It might correspond to travel_enhancement_services.Concierge Services (€3000/month) but cost and context differ. No exact match found; thus, cannot assign rating.

Step 3: List only items with exact matches and their ratings.
